CREATE INDEX tournament_registration_fields_org_idx ON public.tournament_registration_fields USING btree (org_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tournament_registration_fields_pkey ON public.tournament_registration_fields USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX tournament_registration_fields_tournament_idx ON public.tournament_registration_fields USING btree (tournament_id, is_archived, sort_order)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_tournament_org_slug_non_archived ON public.tournaments USING btree (organization_id, slug) WHERE (status <> 'archived'::text)
CREATE INDEX idx_tournaments_created_at ON public.tournaments USING btree (created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_tournaments_results_notified_at ON public.tournaments USING btree (results_notified_at DESC) WHERE (results_notified_at IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tournaments_organization_slug_live_unique ON public.tournaments USING btree (organization_id, slug) WHERE (status <> 'archived'::text)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tournaments_pkey ON public.tournaments USING btree (id)
